color_story: Golden amber at full saturation anchors the leaderboard rank and active navigation—a single warm sun-glint on cream neutrals. Sage green whispers only in victory badges and code texture. The entire page breathes in 97.5%-lit stone: page background at #FAF8F2, card backgrounds at #F2ECE0, eliminating any cool gray contamination. Dark mode inverts to forest stone (800/900) with text lifted to cream, preserving warmth throughout.
